Bash(curl -s -H "x-apisports-key: 058cc2984aa08f375fa2554839e3cbc3" "https://v3.football.api-sports.io/fixtures?team=645&league=2&season=2025&status=FT-AET-PEN" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Results:', d['results']\)
for f in d['response']:
    fx = f['fixture']
    t = f['teams']
    g = f['goals']
    print\(f'{fx[\\"id\\"]} | {fx[\\"date\\"][:10]} | {t[\\"home\\"][\\"name\\"]} {g[\\"home\\"]}-{g[\\"away\\"]} {t[\\"away\\"][\\"name\\"]} | {f[\\"league\\"][\\"round\\"]}'\)
")

")

Bash(curl -s -H "X-Auth-Token: d09957f5c3734cef959b9570527f350e" "https://api.football-data.org/v4/competitions/CL/matches?season=2025&status=FINISHED" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Total matches:', d.get\('resultSet', {}\).get\('count', 0\)\)
# Show GS matches
for m in d.get\('matches', []\):
    h = m['homeTeam']['name']
    a = m['awayTeam']['name']
    if 'Galatasaray' in \(h or ''\) or 'Galatasaray' in \(a or ''\):
        print\(f'{m[\\"id\\"]} | {m[\\"utcDate\\"][:10]} | {h} {m[\\"score\\"][\\"fullTime\\"][\\"home\\"]}-{m[\\"score\\"][\\"fullTime\\"][\\"away\\"]} {a} | MD{m[\\"matchday\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1 | head -30)

Bash(curl -s -H "X-Auth-Token: d09957f5c3734cef959b9570527f350e" "https://api.football-data.org/v4/competitions/CL/matches?season=2025&status=FINISHED" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Check if match data includes bookings
for m in d.get\('matches', []\):
    if 'Galatasaray' in \(m['homeTeam']['name'] or ''\):
        print\(json.dumps\(list\(m.keys\(\)\), indent=2\)\)
        # Check for bookings key
        if 'bookings' in m:
            print\('Has bookings!'\)
        break
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s "https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/uefa.champions/teams/432/statistics?season=2025" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Look for discipline/card stats
team = d.get\('team', {}\)
stats = team.get\('statistics', []\)
for s in stats:
    if 'card' in s.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'yellow' in s.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'discipline' in s.get\('name',''\).lower\(\) or 'foul' in s.get\('name',''\).lower\(\):
        print\(json.dumps\(s, indent=2\)[:500]\)
print\('---'\)
print\('All stat names:', [s.get\('name'\) for s in stats]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json, urllib.request

TEAM_ID = "432"
SLUG = "tur.1"

url = f"https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/{SLUG}/teams/{TEAM_ID}/schedule?season=2025"
with urllib.request.urlopen\(url\) as r:
    schedule = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)

events = schedule.get\('events', []\)
finished = sorted\(
    [e for e in events if e.get\('competitions', [{}]\)[0].get\('status', {}\).get\('type', {}\).get\('state'\) == 'post'],
    key=lambda e: e['date']
\)

# Track Sallai match by match
SALLAI_ID = None

for i, e in enumerate\(finished\):
    eid = e['id']
    url2 = f"https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/{SLUG}/summary?event={eid}"
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(url2\) as r2:
        summary = json.loads\(r2.read\(\)\)
    
    for team in summary.get\('rosters', []\):
        if str\(team.get\('team', {}\).get\('id', ''\)\) != TEAM_ID:
            continue
        
        sallai_in_match = False
        sallai_yc = 0
        for p in team.get\('roster', []\):
            athlete = p.get\('athlete', {}\)
            name = athlete.get\('displayName', ''\)
            if 'Sallai' in name:
                SALLAI_ID = str\(athlete.get\('id', ''\)\)
                sallai_in_match = True
                for s in p.get\('stats', []\):
                    if s.get\('name'\) == 'yellowCards':
                        sallai_yc = int\(s.get\('value', 0\)\)
        
        status = "PLAYED" if sallai_in_match else "NOT IN SQUAD"
        yc_str = f" \(YC: {sallai_yc}\)" if sallai_yc > 0 else ""
        print\(f"Match {i+1}: {e['date'][:10]} | {e['name']:<45} | Sallai: {status}{yc_str}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json, urllib.request

# Get actual Süper Lig teams
url = "https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/tur.1/teams?season=2025"
with urllib.request.urlopen\(url\) as r:
    data = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)

league_team_ids = set\(\)
league_team_names = {}
for t in data.get\('sports', [{}]\)[0].get\('leagues', [{}]\)[0].get\('teams', []\):
    team = t['team']
    league_team_ids.add\(str\(team['id']\)\)
    league_team_names[str\(team['id']\)] = team['displayName']

print\(f"Süper Lig teams: {len\(league_team_ids\)}"\)

# Now check GS schedule - which matches have non-league opponents?
url2 = "https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/tur.1/teams/432/schedule?season=2025"
with urllib.request.urlopen\(url2\) as r2:
    schedule = json.loads\(r2.read\(\)\)

events = schedule.get\('events', []\)
finished = sorted\(
    [e for e in events if e.get\('competitions', [{}]\)[0].get\('status', {}\).get\('type', {}\).get\('state'\) == 'post'],
    key=lambda e: e['date']
\)

for i, e in enumerate\(finished\):
    comp = e.get\('competitions', [{}]\)[0]
    opponents = comp.get\('competitors', []\)
    opp_name = "?"
    opp_id = "?"
    is_league = True
    for c in opponents:
        if str\(c['team']['id']\) != "432":
            opp_id = str\(c['team']['id']\)
            opp_name = c['team']['displayName']
            if opp_id not in league_team_ids:
                is_league = False

    marker = "✅" if is_league else "❌ KUPA MAÇI!"
    print\(f"{i+1}. {e['date'][:10]} | {opp_name:<25} | {marker}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json, urllib.request

TEAM_ID = "432"
SLUG = "tur.1"
SALLAI_ID = "219444"

url = f"https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/{SLUG}/teams/{TEAM_ID}/schedule?season=2025"
with urllib.request.urlopen\(url\) as r:
    schedule = json.loads\(r.read\(\)\)

events = schedule.get\('events', []\)
finished = sorted\(
    [e for e in events if e.get\('competitions', [{}]\)[0].get\('status', {}\).get\('type', {}\).get\('state'\) == 'post'],
    key=lambda e: e['date']
\)

for e in finished:
    eid = e['id']
    url2 = f"https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/soccer/{SLUG}/summary?event={eid}"
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(url2\) as r2:
        summary = json.loads\(r2.read\(\)\)
    
    for team in summary.get\('rosters', []\):
        if str\(team.get\('team', {}\).get\('id', ''\)\) != TEAM_ID:
            continue
        for p in team.get\('roster', []\):
            athlete = p.get\('athlete', {}\)
            if str\(athlete.get\('id', ''\)\) != SALLAI_ID:
                continue
            yc = rc = 0
            for s in p.get\('stats', []\):
                if s.get\('name'\) == 'yellowCards': yc = int\(s.get\('value', 0\)\)
                if s.get\('name'\) == 'redCards': rc = int\(s.get\('value', 0\)\)
            if yc > 0 or rc > 0:
                print\(f"{e['date'][:10]} | {e['name']:<45} | YC={yc} RC={rc}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import math

SIZE = 1024
img = Image.new\('RGBA', \(SIZE, SIZE\), \(0, 0, 0, 0\)\)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\)

cx, cy = SIZE // 2, SIZE // 2
radius = 180

# Rounded rect helper
def rounded_rect\(draw, xy, r, fill\):
    x0, y0, x1, y1 = xy
    draw.rectangle\([x0 + r, y0, x1 - r, y1], fill=fill\)
    draw.rectangle\([x0, y0 + r, x1, y1 - r], fill=fill\)
    draw.pieslice\([x0, y0, x0 + 2*r, y0 + 2*r], 180, 270, fill=fill\)
    draw.pieslice\([x1 - 2*r, y0, x1, y0 + 2*r], 270, 360, fill=fill\)
    draw.pieslice\([x0, y1 - 2*r, x0 + 2*r, y1], 90, 180, fill=fill\)
    draw.pieslice\([x1 - 2*r, y1 - 2*r, x1, y1], 0, 90, fill=fill\)

# Background gradient: deep navy to dark blue
for i in range\(SIZE\):
    ratio = i / SIZE
    r = int\(15 + ratio * 10\)
    g = int\(20 + ratio * 15\)
    b = int\(45 + ratio * 20\)
    draw.line\([\(0, i\), \(SIZE, i\)], fill=\(r, g, b, 255\)\)

# Rounded rect mask
mask = Image.new\('L', \(SIZE, SIZE\), 0\)
mask_draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(mask\)
rounded_rect\(mask_draw, \(0, 0, SIZE, SIZE\), radius, 255\)
img.putalpha\(mask\)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\)

# === YELLOW CARD - bigger, brighter, tilted ===
card_w, card_h = 420, 560
card_cx, card_cy = cx, cy - 30

# Rotated card using polygon
tilt = math.radians\(-8\)
cos_t, sin_t = math.cos\(tilt\), math.sin\(tilt\)

def rotate_point\(px, py, ocx, ocy, cos_a, sin_a\):
    dx, dy = px - ocx, py - ocy
    return \(ocx + dx * cos_a - dy * sin_a, ocy + dx * sin_a + dy * cos_a\)

# Card corners
corners = [
    \(card_cx - card_w//2, card_cy - card_h//2\),
    \(card_cx + card_w//2, card_cy - card_h//2\),
    \(card_cx + card_w//2, card_cy + card_h//2\),
    \(card_cx - card_w//2, card_cy + card_h//2\),
]
rotated = [rotate_point\(x, y, card_cx, card_cy, cos_t, sin_t\) for x, y in corners]

# Card shadow
shadow_offset = 12
shadow_corners = [\(x + shadow_offset, y + shadow_offset\) for x, y in rotated]
draw.polygon\(shadow_corners, fill=\(0, 0, 0, 60\)\)

# Main yellow card
draw.polygon\(rotated, fill=\(255, 210, 0, 255\), outline=\(230, 180, 0, 255\), width=4\)

# Brighter top gradient on card
for i in range\(200\):
    ratio = i / 200
    alpha = int\(\(1 - ratio\) * 50\)
    y = card_cy - card_h//2 + i
    x1 = card_cx - card_w//2 + 10
    x2 = card_cx + card_w//2 - 10
    p1 = rotate_point\(x1, y, card_cx, card_cy, cos_t, sin_t\)
    p2 = rotate_point\(x2, y, card_cx, card_cy, cos_t, sin_t\)
    draw.line\([p1, p2], fill=\(255, 255, 255, alpha\), width=1\)

# === RADAR on card ===
radar_cx, radar_cy = card_cx + 5, card_cy - 10

# Radar circles - bold, dark amber
for r_size in [150, 105, 60]:
    draw.ellipse\(
        [radar_cx - r_size, radar_cy - r_size, radar_cx + r_size, radar_cy + r_size],
        outline=\(180, 120, 0, 180\), width=3
    \)

# Center dot
draw.ellipse\([radar_cx - 5, radar_cy - 5, radar_cx + 5, radar_cy + 5], fill=\(180, 120, 0, 200\)\)

# Cross lines
draw.line\([\(radar_cx - 160, radar_cy\), \(radar_cx + 160, radar_cy\)], fill=\(180, 120, 0, 120\), width=2\)
draw.line\([\(radar_cx, radar_cy - 160\), \(radar_cx, radar_cy + 160\)], fill=\(180, 120, 0, 120\), width=2\)

# Radar sweep - bright red
sweep_angle = math.radians\(55\)
sweep_len = 155
sweep_ex = radar_cx + int\(sweep_len * math.cos\(sweep_angle\)\)
sweep_ey = radar_cy - int\(sweep_len * math.sin\(sweep_angle\)\)

# Sweep glow
for w in range\(8, 0, -1\):
    alpha = int\(40 + \(8 - w\) * 20\)
    draw.line\([\(radar_cx, radar_cy\), \(sweep_ex, sweep_ey\)], fill=\(230, 57, 70, alpha\), width=w\)

# Blip dots - bright red with glow
blips = [
    \(radar_cx + 65, radar_cy - 75\),
    \(radar_cx - 45, radar_cy + 85\),
    \(radar_cx + 100, radar_cy + 30\),
    \(radar_cx - 80, radar_cy - 40\),
]
for bx, by in blips:
    # Outer glow
    for g in range\(16, 0, -2\):
        alpha = int\(15 + \(16-g\) * 8\)
        draw.ellipse\([bx-g, by-g, bx+g, by+g], fill=\(230, 57, 70, alpha\)\)
    # Core
    draw.ellipse\([bx - 7, by - 7, bx + 7, by + 7], fill=\(230, 57, 70, 255\)\)
    draw.ellipse\([bx - 3, by - 3, bx + 3, by + 3], fill=\(255, 120, 120, 255\)\)

# === TEXT ===
try:
    font_bold = ImageFont.truetype\("/System/Library/Fonts/Supplemental/Arial Bold.ttf", 100\)
except:
    try:
        font_bold = ImageFont.truetype\("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 100\)
    except:
        font_bold = ImageFont.load_default\(\)

text = "KART RADAR"

# Try smaller font for full text, or just KR
try:
    font_title = ImageFont.truetype\("/System/Library/Fonts/Supplemental/Arial Bold.ttf", 68\)
except:
    font_title = font_bold

bbox = draw.textbbox\(\(0, 0\), text, font=font_title\)
tw = bbox[2] - bbox[0]

# If text is too wide, use abbreviation
if tw > SIZE - 100:
    text = "KARTRADAR"
    try:
        font_title = ImageFont.truetype\("/System/Library/Fonts/Supplemental/Arial Bold.ttf", 78\)
    except:
        pass
    bbox = draw.textbbox\(\(0, 0\), text, font=font_title\)
    tw = bbox[2] - bbox[0]

text_x = cx - tw // 2
text_y = card_cy + card_h // 2 + 35

# Text shadow
draw.text\(\(text_x + 3, text_y + 3\), text, fill=\(0, 0, 0, 100\), font=font_title\)
# Main text - white
draw.text\(\(text_x, text_y\), text, fill=\(255, 255, 255, 255\), font=font_title\)

# Save all sizes
img.save\('/Users/sinansislioglu/Desktop/claude-projeler/KartRadar/assets/icon.png'\)
img.save\('/Users/sinansislioglu/Desktop/claude-projeler/KartRadar/assets/splash-icon.png'\)
img.save\('/Users/sinansislioglu/Desktop/claude-projeler/KartRadar/assets/android-icon-foreground.png'\)

favicon = img.resize\(\(48, 48\), Image.LANCZOS\)
favicon.save\('/Users/sinansislioglu/Desktop/claude-projeler/KartRadar/assets/favicon.png'\)

print\("Logo generated!"\)
PYEOF)
